channel.description: Latest marine jobs for Tanker Fleet
channel.title: Maritime Union - Job for Mariners

item.description:
Location:
Description:

Experienced Master, Second Officer, Chief Engineer, Second Engineer, and Third Engineer are sought for oil and chemical tanker vessels. Previous experience on similar tankers and a valid Turkish Seaman's Book are required. Joining is urgent in July. Positions are available on 40,000-80,000 DWT vessels.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Master, Officer, Engineer Jobs on Tanker Vessels at Pera Shipping

item.description:
Location:
Description:

Experienced Master, Second Officer, Chief Engineer, Second Engineer, and Third Engineer are sought for Oil and Chemical Tankers ranging from 40,000 to 80,000 DWT. Candidates must have relevant tanker experience and a valid Turkish Seaman's Book. Immediate joining is required in July.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Officers Needed for Oil Chemical Tankers at Pera Shipping

item.description:
Location:
Description:

Hiring is open for experienced tanker professionals. Seeking applications for the positions of Master, Chief Officer, Chief Engineer, and Second Engineer. Candidates with prior tanker experience are specifically encouraged to apply for these onboard roles.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Master, Chief Officer, Chief Engineer, 2nd Engineer - Tanker at aethertanker.com

item.description:
Location:
Description:

A Gas Tanker Master and Officers (Chief Officer, Chief Engineer, Second Engineer) are sought for an upcoming contract. Candidates with solid offshore experience are encouraged to apply. This is an opportunity to join a high-performing team on a gas tanker.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Master Officer Vacancy on Gas Tanker at Lowland International

item.description:
Location:
Description:

Experienced deck and engine officers with previous LNG experience are sought for positions on a growing LNG fleet. Candidates should possess valid certification and a strong commitment to safety and operational excellence. This role offers competitive employment opportunities, professional development, and career progression within a safety-focused LNG operation.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] LNG Officer Vacancies - LNG Carrier Fleet at Zorovic Maritime Services

item.description:
Location: España
Description:

A maritime position is available on an LNG/LPG vessel under the French flag. The contract duration is 4 weeks on and 4 weeks off. English language proficiency is required. The joining date is imminent.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] LNG/LPG Crew Vacancy - French Flag at CANDINA GROUP

item.description:
Location: Perú Venezuela
Description:

A position for an Officer on an LPG tanker is available for routes between Peru and Venezuela. Candidates with experience on gas vessels are sought for immediate embarkation. Specific joining dates and contract details will be provided upon application.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Officer LPG Job - Gas Tanker at CANDINA GROUP

item.description:
Location:
Description:

A maritime company is seeking an Officer for an LPG vessel. This position is open to Asian seafarers with 3-4 years of sea-going experience. An immediate opening is available.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] LPG Officer Vacancy at CANDINA GROUP

item.description:
Location:
Description:

A Chief Officer is sought for a Chemical/Oil Tanker vessel up to 15000 DWT. The role requires 3 years of tanker experience, including 1 year on product tankers, and 12 months in rank experience. Candidates must possess valid tanker specialisation certificates and have very good English proficiency. The contract duration is 56 days on and 54 days off. Joining is scheduled for July 2026. A salary of 10029 EUR per worked month is offered.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Chief Officer Job - Chemical/Oil Tanker 10029 EUR at Nedcon Maritime Manpower Supply

item.description:
Location:
Description:

Vacancies are currently open for seafarers on an expanding gas fleet, including LNG and LPG vessels. Interested candidates are invited to submit their applications online or via email.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] LNG/LPG Fleet Vacancies at PASAT Shipping Services Ltd.
